assertions.assertion: Calls .AddSaml() on the IdentityServer builder chain
assertions.rationale: The code clearly shows .AddSaml() chained on the IdentityServer builder.

assertions.assertion: No separate NuGet package is added — SAML is built into Duende.IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states no additional NuGet package is needed and SAML is built into Duende.IdentityServer.

assertions.assertion: A SamlServiceProvider is created with EntityId set to 'https://crm.contoso.com'
AssertionConsumerServiceUrls uses IndexedEndpoint with Location 'https://crm.contoso.com/saml/acs' and Binding = SamlBinding.HttpPost
assertions.rationale: Code shows IndexedEndpoint with correct Location and SamlBinding.HttpPost.

assertions.assertion: AllowedScopes is configured on the SamlServiceProvider (not empty)
assertions.rationale: AllowedScopes = ["openid", "profile", "email"] is set on the SP.
